scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "SERVER,CLIENT,ELECTRON" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev" "npm run electron:dev"
scripts.electron:dev: wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3001 && cd electron && npx electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && cd electron && npx electron-builder
